title: Crate Delight
description: Useful crates and bags that will save you storage and look great.
body:
[![BisectHosting Sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/903e2fc7d06b24656efb3c06ec9bdd42bd3fb253.png)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/bn9fZ)
![Crate Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/08301232d2f09004e6c6691604fac93d92cb462d.png)
**Expand your storage with crates and bags for your items!** Crate Delight lets you craft crates and bags to organize your resources with style, keeping your chests clutter-free and your inventory in order. [Check out the gallery to see more](https://modrinth.com/project/crate-delight/gallery). ## 🍎 Features - **Crates:** Store items like Apples, Sweet Berries, Eggs, Raw Salmon, Raw Cod, Glow Berries, Golden Apples, and many more! - **Bags:** For items like Cocoa Beans, Sugar, Gunpowder, and others.
## 🛠️ Add-ons - [Crate Delight: Croptopia](https://modrinth.com/mod/crate-delight-croptopia)  - Adds over 50 new crates and bags for Croptopia. ![Crate Delight Images](https://i.imgur.com/NtolJjX.gif) [![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
[![Patreon Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Axperty) [![PayPal Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/paypal-singular_64h.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn) [![Ko-Fi Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/axperty)
